title: Airline Delay Announcement
text:
## Airline Delay Announcement

Good afternoon, passengers on flight {number} to {place}.

Your departure has been delayed because a {adjective} {animal} was seen {verb ending in -ing} near the runway.

**While you wait:**
- Please keep all {plural noun} under your seat
- Do not {verb} the boarding door
- Enjoy one complimentary {food}

**Updated boarding time:** {number} minutes after the captain finishes inspecting the {object}.

We appreciate your {adjective} patience and promise the snack cart is only mildly {adjective}.
